Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators.RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener

  • Packages that use RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.ar.calibration
    This package contains classes used for camera calibration on 3D reconstruction
    com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators
    This package contains classes needed to estimate structures needed for camera calibration

    • Uses of RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.ar.calibration

      Fields in com.irurueta.ar.calibration declared as RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener AlternatingCameraCalibrator.mDistortionEstimatorListener
      Listener for robust estimator of radial distortion.
      private RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener ErrorOptimizationCameraCalibrator.mDistortionEstimatorListener
      Listener for robust estimator of radial distortion.

    • Uses of RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators

      Fields in com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators declared as RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener RadialDistortionRobustEstimator.mListener
      Listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators that return RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      RadialDistortionRobustEstimatorListener RadialDistortionRobustEstimator.getListener()
      Returns reference to listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
